mapper.sql: id, code, name, description, status, owner_user_id, default_locale, default_timezone, revision, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workspace (id, code, name, description, status, owner_user_id, default_locale, default_timezone, revision, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{status, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{ownerUserId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{defaultLocale}, #{defaultTimezone}, #{revision}, #{createdAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler})
mapper.update: UPDATE workspace SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, default_locale = #{defaultLocale}, default_timezone = #{defaultTimezone}, updated_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision}
